tabsDescriptions.play: Launch the game and review session-ready status.
tabsDescriptions.servers: Browse servers, favorites, and cluster state.
tabsDescriptions.gameOptions: Install, update, validate, and manage the game build.
tabsDescriptions.dlc: Review DLC installation state and available updates.
tabsDescriptions.mods: Manage workshop mods, previews, and installed content.
tabsDescriptions.launcherSettings: Change launcher paths, behavior, and cleanup options.
tabsDescriptions.about: View project information, versioning, and credits.

playTab.highProcessPriorityDesc: Run the game with higher CPU priority.
playTab.launcherLanguageAvailabilityNote: Additional launcher translations are unavailable in this build because the localization files are missing.
playTab.launchBehaviorNoteLinux: Linux launches ARK through Steam/Proton. Windows-only elevation behavior is not used on this platform.

gameOptionsTab.cleanDownloadCachePrompt: Do you want to clean the download cache? This will delete all cached game files and they will need to be downloaded again.
gameOptionsTab.enablingAnselSupport: Enabling Ansel support will disable anti-cheat features in online modes.
gameOptionsTab.maintenanceNoteLinux: Game maintenance actions run natively on Linux, while game launch goes through Steam/Proton. Windows-only priority and DirectX checks are hidden on this platform.
gameOptionsTab.maintenanceNoteWindows: Game update, validation, and file maintenance run directly from the current launcher shell.

dlcTab.sectionNote: Install, update, validate, and delete DLC content from the native launcher. Operations use the shared Steam task backend and refresh launcher status when they finish.

modsTab.modInfoFileMissing: mod.info file is missing or corrupted.
modsTab.notAnARKMod: Selected folder is not a valid ARK mod.
modsTab.modWithThisIdDoesntExist: A mod with this ID does not exist on Steam Workshop.
modsTab.failedToGetManifestRequestCode: Failed to get manifest request code
modsTab.failedToGetCDNServerList: Failed to get CDN server list
modsTab.modsOnSteamWarning: Mods are available on Steam Workshop.
modsTab.requestingModDetailsFail: Failed to request mod details from Steam.
modsTab.adlerHashMismatch: File hash mismatch — the file may have been modified after the list was generated.
modsTab.failedToLoadWorkshopModList: Failed to load workshop mod list.

launcherSettingsTab.linuxLaunchToolNote: Choose which Windows compatibility runtime launches ARK on Linux. Automatic follows Steam's assigned Proton tool when possible, then falls back to the best discovered Proton or Wine build.

errors.fatalErrorMessageLink: copy the error message and send it to the developer
errors.cmConnectionFailed: Failed to connect to the Steam Content Manager.
errors.clustersReloadSteamNotRunning: Steam must be running to reload server clusters.
errors.launchFailCorrupted: Game files appear to be corrupted or missing.
errors.launchFailNotLoggedIntoSteam: Steam user is not logged in or could not be resolved.
errors.launchFailSteamApiCompromised: Steam API appears to be compromised.
errors.launchFailSteamCorrupted: Steam installation appears to be corrupted.
errors.joinFailDLCMissing: Required DLC is missing for this server. Would you like to install it?
errors.joinFailClientVersionHigher: Cannot join — your game is newer than the server.
errors.joinFailServerVersionHigher: Cannot join — your game is older than the server.
errors.updateFailGameRunning: Update failed: the game is currently running.
errors.updateSteamGameWarning: Detected a Steam-managed ARK installation. Continue anyway?
errors.dlcDeletePrompt: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'?
errors.modDeletePrompt: Are you sure you want to delete this mod?
errors.fixBloomFail: Failed to fix the bloom path. Ensure the game folder is set correctly.
errors.unlockSkinsFail: Failed to unlock skins. Ensure the game folder is set correctly.
errors.languageChangeInfo: Restart the launcher to fully apply the language change.
errors.anotherInstanceRunning: Another instance of the launcher is already running.
errors.steamMissing: Steam is not installed or could not be detected.
errors.launcherClosePrompt: Are you sure you want to close the launcher?
errors.deleteLauncherSettingsPrompt: Do you want to permanently delete all launcher settings?

status.pauseRequired: Pause the current task before starting a new one.
status.preparingInstallation: Preparing first-launch installation tasks for ARK.
status.manageArkInstalls: Manage ARK installs, DLC, mods, servers, and launch behavior from the native launcher shell.
status.restartRequiredForSteamClient: Launcher has to be restarted to load new version of tek-steamclient

launchOptimization.noRHIThreadDesc: Disable the Render Hardware Interface thread for improved performance on some systems.
launchOptimization.lowMemoryModeDesc: Enable memory optimizations for low-spec systems.
launchOptimization.useDirectX10Desc: Force the game to use DirectX 10 for compatibility with older hardware.
launchOptimization.noSplashScreenDesc: Skip the ARK logo at startup.
launchOptimization.disableSkyDetailDesc: Reduce skybox draw calls for a modest performance gain.
launchOptimization.disableSPHibernationDesc: Prevent the game from suspending when the window loses focus in singleplayer.
launchOptimization.disableVSyncDesc: Turn off vertical sync to remove the frame rate cap.
launchOptimization.enableAnselSupportDesc: Photography mode support — disables anti-cheat when active.

mainWindow.noInstalledMods: No installed mods were found yet. You can install one by ID above or from the workshop list in this section.
mainWindow.toInstallArkOpenSettings: To install ARK, open Launcher Settings, choose an empty or existing target folder as the Game Path, apply it, then return here and use Update.
mainWindow.gamePathDescription: Set this to your existing ARK folder, or to an empty folder where the launcher should install a managed copy of the game.
mainWindow.customPrefixDescription: Use a custom compatdata root for this ARK setup. Point it at the folder that should contain the Proton/Wine prefix state, not directly at pfx.
mainWindow.placeholderCustomPrefix: Leave blank to use launcher-managed or Steam compatdata
mainWindow.placeholderLaunchWrappers:
One wrapper command per line
obs-gamecapture mangohud

firstLaunchWindow.title: TEK Launcher Setup
firstLaunchWindow.chooseHowToStart: Choose how TEK Launcher should start.
firstLaunchWindow.installNewFolder: Install ARK into a new folder
firstLaunchWindow.chooseInstallDescription: TEK Launcher will use this folder for a managed game installation.
firstLaunchWindow.option1: Install / repair game files through Steam (recommended)

launcherUpdateWindow.launcherUpdateAvailable: A new launcher update is available — restart to install.
launcherUpdateWindow.launcherUpdateFail: Failed to download the launcher update.
launcherUpdateWindow.linuxFallbackNote: Windows builds can replace the launcher binary in place. Linux builds currently fall back to manual release-page updates until Linux artifacts are published.

dlcUpdaterWindow.closeNote: Close the window after pausing or when the task finishes. The underlying Steam task is the same one used by the old updater flow.

serverModsUpdaterWindow.closeNote: Pause before closing if the job is still running, or wait for validation to finish before closing the window.

modUpdaterWindow.closeNote: Pause before closing if the job is still running, or wait for the task to finish before closing the window.
